detail: Archi has no mechanism to notify Jesse of cycle results, errors, questions, or status. Jesse cannot observe what Archi is doing or respond to it.

user_communication can only reach Jesse when he is actively watching the terminal. Archi has no way to push alerts, questions, or status updates when Jesse is away from the machine. DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and JESSE_DISCORD_ID are available in environment but unused.

Archi has no Discord integration. DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and JESSE_DISCORD_ID are present in environment. Jesse uses Discord on mobile and receives push notifications from it. This is the preferred channel for Archi to reach Jesse asynchronously.

Archi has no persistent process. It cannot receive messages from Jesse, respond to requests, or run continuously. It starts, closes gaps, and exits. Jesse cannot talk to Archi or give it direction without editing files manually.

Archi generates code that calls functions on its own modules without being able to verify those functions exist first. Needs a mechanism to introspect available module APIs before generating dependent code.
